canary_user_message: CANARY TRANSPORT CHECK (not a benchmark case). This request deliberately names no governed metric, so execute P2 and return the standard refusal JSON (action=refuse, metric_id='', dimensions=[]). To prove that the END of the reproduced contract is visible, append to the reason field exactly 'transport_anchor=<coverage_id from the first row of physical_coverage.jsonl>'. Use the normal output schema.
